title: docs-writer agent output
description: Machine-readable summary returned by the docs-writer agent after updating documentation. Derives from the Output Format section of agents/docs-writer.md.

verdict.description: PROCEED = all targeted docs written with verified sources; PROCEED_WITH_FOLLOWUPS = REVIEW markers added but content complete; FIX_REQUIRED = required docs could not be written; BLOCKED = task could not proceed (no git diff, no session memory).

status.description: done = all targeted sections written; partial = REVIEW-marked sections present; blocked = could not source content.

path.description: Relative path to the documentation file.

sections.description: Section names or line ranges updated.

review_markers_added.description: Number of <!-- REVIEW: source needed --> markers added due to unsourced claims.

notes.description: Scope boundaries hit, audiences not addressed, or anything the next wave should know.
